# Sagar Rai - Software Engineer Portfolio

> Sagar Rai is a professional iOS Developer and Full-Stack Engineer specializing in Swift, SwiftUI, Next.js, and building scalable applications with 3+ years of experience.

## About
Sagar specializes in Mobile Engineering (native performance optimization), SaaS Architecture, Real-time Systems, and AI/ML integrations. He has built over 30+ applications and actively contributes to open-source software.

## Navigation
- [Home](https://sagarrai.dev/): Landing page and overview.
- [Projects](https://sagarrai.dev/projects): Detailed portfolio of 30+ completed applications (iOS and Web).
- [Experience](https://sagarrai.dev/experience): Professional timeline and internships.
- [Skills](https://sagarrai.dev/skills): Technical stack covering Swift, Next.js, Python, and more.
- [Education](https://sagarrai.dev/education): Academic background.
- [Open Source](https://sagarrai.dev/open-source): Contributions to major projects.
- [Blog](https://sagarrai.dev/blog): Thoughts and insights on software engineering.
- [Contact](https://sagarrai.dev/contact): Reach out for opportunities.
